hint.retryManually: Please retry the previous operation manually

timingAlert.title: Timing Alert
timingAlert.description: Operator auto-decision may not complete encoding in time for this TX slot

realtimeConnectivityWarning.title: Realtime Voice Connectivity Issue
realtimeConnectivityWarning.description:
Realtime voice connectivity failed, so the client may be unable to hear or send audio.

Checks:
- Confirm /api/realtime/rtc-data-audio signaling is reachable
- Confirm rtc-data-audio UDP port {{localUdpPort}} is open or mapped
- Confirm the configured public UDP endpoint is reachable
- Confirm the client can reach {{signalingUrl}}

Technical details: {{details}}

realtimeServiceDown.title: Realtime Voice Service Issue
realtimeServiceDown.description:
The server-side realtime audio service failed, so clients may be unable to hear or send audio.

Checks:
- Confirm /api/realtime/rtc-data-audio signaling is reachable
- Confirm rtc-data-audio UDP port {{localUdpPort}} is open or mapped
- Confirm the configured public UDP endpoint is reachable
- Confirm the client can reach {{signalingUrl}}

Technical details: {{details}}

realtimeNoAudio.title: Realtime Voice Has No Audio
realtimeNoAudio.description:
The realtime audio session is connected, but the server is not receiving any audio frames to publish.

Checks:
- Verify the selected audio source is actually producing data
- Confirm /api/realtime/rtc-data-audio signaling is reachable
- Confirm rtc-data-audio UDP port {{localUdpPort}} is open or mapped
- Confirm the configured public UDP endpoint is reachable
- Confirm the client can reach {{signalingUrl}}

Technical details: {{details}}

sameTransmissionLimit.title: Stopped: repeated message
sameTransmissionLimit.description: Operator {{operatorId}} was stopped before sending the same message again (attempt {{attemptedCount}}, limit {{maxCount}}) to avoid repeatedly occupying the frequency: {{transmission}}

repeaterDuplexUnsupported.title: Repeater DUP not applied
repeaterDuplexUnsupported.description: Switched to {{frequency}} MHz, but this radio does not support repeater DUP control or the DUP setting failed. {{reason}}

toneSquelchUnsupported.title: Tone squelch not applied
toneSquelchUnsupported.description: Switched to {{frequency}} MHz, but this radio does not support tone squelch control or the tone setting failed. {{reason}}
